content:
1. Converts temp between C/F/K (via Celsius intermediate) + round(2); exists for weather service unit handling.
2. Absolute-zero check only triggers on K output (allows invalid negatives otherwise); adding units will break match; float edge behavior.
3. Whether to explicitly validate NaN/Inf inputs.
4. Negative-absolute inputs (except K result), NaN/Inf, non-numeric args, new enum values, precision loss before round.
